name: Foxy | Femboy-ified
description:
"MATEY, THAT'S THE WRONG KIND OF BOOTY!"

★ FNAF Femboy #2 ★

Foxy, the notorious fox/pirate of the Fazbear crew, seems to have gotten a brand new redesign to make him look, quote, 'more appealing to the adults'. It may be a new look for him, but he certainly welcomes the newfound attention that he's getting...
